snippet.title: Grey Hulk (2026) – Unchained Rage | Jason Statham, Ana de Armas, Matt Damon | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#greyhulk  #jasonstatham  #unchainedrage 

This is Grey Hulk: Unchained Rage Fan-Made Concept Trailer

What if the Hulk mythology was stripped down to its darkest, most human core? This Grey Hulk concept trailer reimagines the legend not as a superhero origin but as a brutal story of betrayal and vengeance. Jason Statham plays Dominic Voss, a black-ops ghost who was buried alive in a secret prison after knowing too much, while Ana de Armas portrays the wife who spent twelve years mourning a man who never actually died.

When an unstoppable global threat forces the government to unleash the forbidden Project Goliath serum on the one soldier they tried to erase, the transformation doesn't create a hero. It creates a walking earthquake of grey skin and twelve years of stolen life, and he is not interested in saving anyone.
The storyboard for this Grey Hulk Unchained Rage concept was built around contrast. Massive, city-leveling destruction sequences are intercut with painfully intimate moments, like Elena clutching old dog tags in a quiet house while the news shows a grey monster tearing through tanks on the National Mall. Matt Damon's General Hargrove represents cold, institutional power crumbling against the very weapon he authorized, and Charlize Theron brings a tragic stillness as the scientist who walks out alone to face her own creation. snippet.title: Search My Heart (Video) - English Audio Bible
snippet.description:
"Search My Heart” by English Audio Bible is a heartfelt worship song that expresses a deep desire for God to examine, cleanse, and renew the heart. This powerful song invites believers into a place of honesty, surrender, and spiritual reflection.


---
❤️ If my music has blessed you, consider supporting the Production here: 
👇👇
https://buymeacoffee.com/rmss
---

In our daily walk, it is important to pause and allow God to search our hearts, revealing anything that needs healing or transformation. The Bible says in Psalm 139 verse 23–24 (KJV), “Search me, O God, and know my heart… and lead me in the way everlasting.” This truth forms the foundation of the song, a prayer for purity, guidance, and renewal.

Through sincere lyrics and a reflective atmosphere, “Search My Heart” creates a moment of deep connection with God. It encourages listeners to lay everything before Him and trust in His ability to transform and restore.

Whether you are in prayer, devotion, or a quiet moment of reflection, this song helps you reconnect with God and realign your heart with His will.

Open your heart.
Surrender completely.
Let God lead you.


---

snippet.description:
“All Them Horses” by Noah Kahan live from Fire Tower Farm in Only, TN
Stream/download The Great Divide: The Last Of The Bugs out now: https://noahkahan.lnk.to/thegreatdivide 

Noah Kahan: Vocals, Acoustic Guitar
Alex Bachari: Acoustic Guitar

Linktree: https://linktr.ee/noahkahanmusic
Instagram: http://instagram.com/noahkahanmusic

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@noahkahanmusic
Twitter: https://x.com/noahkahan
Follow Kahan HQ: https://www.instagram.com/kahanhq/ 

Lyrics: 
Window seat in a ‘90s plane
See the rivers meet and spread like veins
Another airport lounge, another time zone change
Gonna dance around and sing about my pain
Okay, it pays

See the dried flood lines on the neighbors’ porches
Do you remember crying for all them horses?
They did not look scared at all
They did not look scared, they did not look scared at all

So tell me when it feels you cannot escape me
Just yell like dad would yell at all the noise I’m making
I’m just happy you still call
I’m just happy, I’m just happy you still call

City kid bought the farm, he’s a real nice guy
Left a lifetime invitation for my friends and I
Couldn’t make it back even if I tried
Oh some things live forever even when they die
Oh my
My my my my my

You know I wanna beat it, I wanna beat it bad
Oh, everyone looks happy in a photograph
I crossed the county line I cannot go back
I’m always on my own
Couldn’t make it home 'cause of all that rain
Oh, run of bad luck in a nowhere state
I’m high above us now in a big jet plane
I’m always on my own
I’m always on my own

I ain’t planned it, the plane
Plane just landed out here
Rubbed my eyes on 89
Double yellow murdered deer
You can vanish, yes love
You can try to disappear
Thousand eyes on a dirt road
Strike a light, let it burn slow
Maybe I’m manic again, but I think this time I’m out for good
I’m a sidewalk preacher with a record deal
I’m the weight of new sneakers on some dead wood
This ain’t mine anymore
I made too much goddamn noise
Done staring at the void
I’m spin-castin’ with the boys

You know I wanna beat it, I wanna beat it bad
Oh, everyone looks happy in a photograph
I crossed the county line, I cannot go back
I’m always on my own
Couldn’t make it home 'cause of all that rain
Oh, run of bad luck in a nowhere state
I’m high above us now in a big jet plane
I’m always on my own
I’m always on my own

See the dried flood lines on the neighbors’ porches
You remember crying for all them horses
They did not look scared at all
They did not look scared, they did not look scared at all
